## PR Checklist 💎🚀

Please ensure your PR meets the following requirements:

- [ ] My code follows the coding standards documentation (v0.1.x).
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors.
- [ ] I have tested my changes in at least one modern browser.
- [ ] My PR has a descriptive title and clearly explains "Why" and "How".

---
*Thank you for contributing to ClipSafe!*
